name: io.github.emretheus/claude-remind-mcp
description: Search past Claude Code conversations. Local BM25 over JSONL with one-click claude --resume.

environmentVariables.description: Override the directory Claude Code stores logs in (default: ~/.claude). Must be an absolute path.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Override where the index is persisted (default: ~/.claude-remind). Must be an absolute path.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_REMIND_DIR
